title: Trademark Licensing Service in Kerala- BookMyTM - Trademark & ISO Services in Kerala

blocks.text: Authorize third-party usage without transferring ownership.
Fill the details below for a callback.
Trademark licensing is the process wherein a registered owner of a trademark authorizes a third party to use the mark in the course of trade without transferring the ownership of the mark.

The licensing allows the registered owner to let others use the mark while retaining ownership. The owner can put limitations on the use through the licensing agreement, such as restricting use to particular goods or services.
Expand your brand's reach and earn royalties without losing control of your intellectual property.
Fill the details below for a callback.
The licensor earns steady income through royalty payments while the licensee exploits the mark commercially.
Licensing helps expand the brand's popularity and reach into new markets or territories without direct investment.
Agreements include clauses for quality checks, ensuring the brand reputation remains intact.
A win-win situation where the licensor monetizes assets and the licensee gains a market-ready brand.
Select package, fill details & make payment.
Filed in 7-9 working days*. (Subject to Govt timelines)

items.a: Trademark licensing is when the registered owner permits a third party to use the mark in trade without transferring ownership. Conditions like specific goods/services can be set in the licensing agreement.

items.q: 2. What are the benefits of Trademark Licensing?
items.a: For the Licensor: Earns royalty and expands the mark’s reach and popularity. For the Licensee: Gains the right to commercially exploit the trademarked goods/services.

items.q: 3. Could I license my trademark to a blogger or fan community infringing on my IP?
items.a: Yes. Instead of pursuing legal action, a licensing agreement can regulate and monetize use, while building positive relationships.

items.q: 4. Are licensed products simply promotional materials?
items.a: No. Licensed products must meet predefined quality standards and are sold, not just given away as promotional items.

items.q: 5. Do I need to sell my licensed product at retail stores?
items.a: Not necessarily. Licensed products can be successfully sold online directly to consumers without retail presence.

items.q: 6. Is trademark licensing the same as trademark assigning?
items.a: No. Trademark licensing allows use of the mark without transferring ownership. Trademark assignment transfers full ownership.
